comment: Emissive overlay for the Breaker device's main body. Inherits all geometry from `nodeworks:block/breaker` and only overrides the `#0` texture binding to point at breaker_emissive.png. Mirrors the user_emissive.json / placer_emissive.json pattern: any face the artist paints in breaker_emissive.png lights up at the network colour with the SAME per-face UV layout breaker.json uses.
